title: ORA Page Views
description: Configuration for static application page views such as the home page and CMS-like pages.

rootPagePathSegment.description: Top-level URL-safe page segment. Must not collide with reserved application routes.

heroAlign.description: Horizontal alignment of the hero content.

heroBackground.description: Predefined hero background style. Ignored or overlaid when a hero image is configured, depending on the frontend implementation.

heroOptions.description: Optional hero configuration for a page view.

title.description: Optional static title or translation key rendered as the hero title.

subTitle.description: Optional static subtitle or translation key rendered below the hero title.

align.description: Optional horizontal alignment of the hero content. Defaults to center.

background.description: Optional predefined background style for the hero. Defaults to light.

image.description: Optional hero background image source resolved through the content service.

file.description: Markdown file path loaded through the content service.

markdownContent.description: Content block rendering a markdown file.

linkedListItem.description: Single linked list item. Internal path wins over external url if both are configured.

label.description: Static label or translation key rendered as the link text.

icon.description: Optional icon name rendered before the label.

path.description: Optional internal application path. If both path and url are configured, path takes precedence.

url.description: Optional external URL. Used only when no internal path is configured.

linkedListContent.description: Content block rendering a list of internal and external links.

content.description: Content block rendered inside a content section.

contentBlockList.description: Ordered content blocks rendered together inside one content section.

contentSection.description: Grouped content section. Blocks inside one section belong together and are rendered as one visual section by the content renderer.

blocks.description: Content blocks belonging to this section.

contentSectionList.description: Ordered content sections rendered in a page area.

pageContent.description: Content areas for a CMS-like page.

main.description: Content sections rendered in the main page area.

aside.description: Optional content sections rendered in the aside area. In menu pages this is rendered below the side menu; in one-pagers it can be rendered below or beside the main content depending on the frontend.

pageView.description: Nested CMS-like page view. Can contain content and further nested child views.

path.description: URL path segment for this page view.

title.description: Static title or translation key for this page view.

icon.description: Optional icon name rendered in the side navigation.

content.description: Optional content rendered by this page view.

page.description: Top-level CMS-like page. Can be a one-pager with content or a page area with nested views and side navigation.

path.description: Top-level URL path segment for this page.

title.description: Static title or translation key for this page.

icon.description: Optional icon name rendered in the page navigation header.

content.description: Optional content rendered directly by this top-level page. Useful for one-pagers such as imprint or privacy pages.

views.description: Nested page views belonging to this top-level page. If configured, they are rendered as the side navigation menu.

pageList.description: CMS-like pages rendered through the catch-all page route.

hero.description: Optional hero section rendered on the home page.

main.description: Content sections rendered in the main home page area.

aside.description: Content sections rendered in the home page aside area.
